title: Fix multi-repository activity overview layout
summary: Corrected the activity overview layout so multiple repository cards wrap below the page heading instead of pushing the Product snapshots intro down the desktop page. The overview rail now moves to a two-column lower grid until there is enough 2xl width for a side rail, and repository summary cards flex to their container with stable truncated metadata.
userVisibleChange: The Activity overview remains readable when several repositories are present: the Product snapshots heading stays at the top, repository cards wrap responsively, and the page avoids horizontal overflow on desktop, tablet, and mobile widths.

risks.title: Mobile shell remains tall
risks.mitigation: This change prevents activity-surface overflow; global mobile navigation can be handled separately if needed.

timeline.title: Diagnosed header alignment
timeline.summary: Identified the desktop breakage as bottom alignment against a wrapped repository-card column.

timeline.title: Reworked responsive layout
timeline.summary: Moved repository cards under the heading, made them auto-fit their container, and let the metrics rail reflow below until 2xl.

timeline.title: Verified responsive behavior
timeline.summary: Ran build/tests and Playwright checks at desktop, tablet, and 320px mobile widths.

decisions.title: Scope fix to RepositoryActivityView
decisions.rationale: The broken behavior came from the activity header/grid composition, so the global app shell did not need a redesign.

decisions.title: Use vertical header flow for repository cards
decisions.rationale: A normal header flow prevents wrapped repository cards from controlling the heading's vertical alignment.

decisions.title: Move the metrics rail to the 2xl breakpoint
decisions.rationale: The side rail should only sit beside the main content when enough horizontal room remains for the repository card grid and activity graph.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed; embedded UI assets copied to cmd/eve/ui_dist.
2048x1090 desktop, 1024x900 tablet, and 320x844 mobile checks showed no horizontal overflow; desktop title remained above repository cards.

artifacts.description: Desktop activity overview after the multi-repository layout fix.
Tablet activity overview after responsive wrapping.
Small mobile activity overview overflow check.
